google.setupHint: Create project → enable APIs (Gmail + Calendar) → create OAuth client (type: Web application)
google.syncMailTitle: Fetch new mail since last sync

icloud.appPasswordHint: Apple ID → Security → App-Specific Passwords → Generate
icloud.icloudEmailPlaceholder: iCloud mail address for Mail/Notes (e.g. firstname@icloud.com) – optional
icloud.enterCredentialsHint: Enter and save credentials, then test the connection.

calls.title: Call list (iPhone + WhatsApp)
calls.description: Reads calls from the Mac call list and WhatsApp and links them to applications via contacts.
calls.requiresAgent: Requires the Rapport Agent (see the "Agent" tab) — runs automatically in the background, no manual start needed.
calls.syncNewTitle: Fetch new calls since last sync
calls.agentUnreachable: Agent not reachable. Check the "Agent" tab (is it running? token set correctly?).

files.title: Local application documents
files.description: Scans a folder for PDF, DOCX, TXT, and Markdown files and links them to applications based on file and folder names.
files.requiresAgent: Requires the Rapport Agent (see the "Agent" tab) — runs automatically in the background, no manual start needed.
files.folderPathHint: Subfolder names (e.g. "Contoso", "Fabrikam") are recognized as company names.
files.agentUnreachable: Agent not reachable. Check the "Agent" tab (is it running? token set correctly?).

syncControl.description: Disabled sources are skipped on the next global sync. Individual sources can still be triggered manually in their respective panels.
syncControl.logLevelHint: Normal: status, create, delete, merge, import · Verbose: + all field changes

linkedin.title: LinkedIn sync
linkedin.syncDescription: Syncs submitted applications from LinkedIn. New ones are created; archived ones (in an earlier phase) are marked as rejected.
linkedin.credentialsHint: Enter your LinkedIn credentials. The password is stored encrypted.
linkedin.optionAText: Open the LinkedIn app on your phone and confirm the login request — the sync will then continue automatically.
linkedin.optionBText: Enter the 6-digit code from email or SMS:
linkedin.loginTip: Tip: log in manually once on linkedin.com, then try again.
linkedin.messagesHint: Upload your LinkedIn message export ("Get a copy of your data" → messages.csv) to attach conversations to matching contacts as timeline entries.

backup.title: Database backup
backup.description: Creates regular copies of the SQLite database (contains all applications and settings) in a configurable folder.
backup.confirmRestoreTextPrefix: All current data will be replaced by
backup.confirmRestoreTextManual: All current data will be replaced by the contents of this file. This action cannot be undone.
backup.manualRestoreHint: Choose any backup file (.zip or .db) and restore it — works regardless of whether automatic backup is enabled or a backup folder is set up.

account.title: Account
account.linkedinProfileSynced: Profile synced {{date}} — used for AI assessment
account.linkedinProfileNotSynced: Not synced yet — used for AI assessment once synced
account.homeLocationHint: Used to show the distance from home to each application's job location.
account.homeLocationPlaceholder: Enter your home city or address…
account.geolocationNoLabel: Couldn't determine an address for your location.
account.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.

logos.title: Company logos
logos.description: Logo.dev provides high-quality company logos (incl. headhunters). Free up to 10,000 requests/month. Without a key, Google Favicons is used as a fallback.
logos.active: Logo.dev active — logos are loaded preferentially
logos.inactive: No key — only Google Favicons as fallback

maps.title: Location autocomplete
maps.description: With a Google Maps API key (Places API), location search on applications uses Google suggestions including specific places/POIs instead of just city names. Without a key, search falls back to OpenStreetMap (Nominatim) — works, but only returns cities. The key is stored encrypted and never sent to the browser.
maps.active: Google Places active — autocomplete also returns POIs
maps.inactive: No key — location search uses OpenStreetMap (cities only, no POIs)

agent.title: Rapport Agent
agent.description: The agent runs on your computer and replaces the former separate bridges (files, notes, calls). The token is shown once when the agent first starts — paste it here to establish the connection. Stored encrypted, never leaves the server in plain text.
agent.tokenPlaceholder: Shown when the agent first starts
agent.platformLimited: This feature is only available on macOS (requires Apple Notes / iPhone Continuity)
